claims.notes: Bootstrap coordination guardrail for parallel Codex/Claude work. This is coordination evidence, not approval or authority.
Stacked on PR #160 because mini-crawler depends on mini-web-types. Deterministic crawler planning/admission only; no network fetcher or parser.
Fix Windows compile failure: gate std::os::unix::fs::symlink behind #[cfg(unix)], add runtime-Unsupported fallback on other platforms. No behavior change on Unix; no new capability.

Track B3: extractor protocol (mini-extract-protocol) + isolated host (mini-extract-host), mirroring mini-pipeline-protocol/mini-build-runner-wasmtime's subprocess-isolation discipline. One simple plain-text-normalize extractor; PDF/HTML deferred to Track B4.

CI scope only. Narrows the reproducibility job's build to the four crates whose example binaries it already hashes; the two-clean-build discipline and the compared artifact set are unchanged. Also closes the stale claim for issue #161, whose PR #162 merged 2026-07-19T01:22:31Z.

Phase 2 of post-quantum identity migration (D-0095, issue #15): ML-DSA-65 key generation + isolated signing in mini-crypto. No did-mini/KEL wiring, no default-suite change. Decision renumbered D-0320 -> D-0322 during rebase to avoid colliding with PR #174's independently-claimed D-0320 (CI reproducibility scope) and PR #180's D-0321 (KEL witness receipt types).

Phase 1 of KEL witness receipts (audit #12 F4, invariant M3): WitnessPolicy/WitnessReceiptStatement/WitnessReceipt/WitnessedEventCertificate types in did-mini. Canonical encoding + signature/threshold verification only, no witness state machine, no KEL-verification wiring, no network.
